summary: The user sought fashion inspiration, particularly for layering outfits and styling a new cognac shoulder bag with distressed denim jeans. They also expressed interest in new hairstyles and requested recommendations for hair styling products and tools suitable for their medium-thick, wavy-curly hair and round face shape.
facts: The user is interested in fashion and has been exploring layering styles. The user recently purchased a cognac shoulder bag from Coach outlet and has been wearing it daily. The user bought distressed denim jeans from H&M last Saturday. The user got a haircut and color last month, which boosted their confidence in trying new hairstyles. The user regularly uses a sea salt spray and volumizing mousse recommended by their stylist. The user has medium-thick, wavy, and slightly curly hair. The user has a round face shape. The user is inspired by fashion influencers on Instagram for new hairstyle ideas.
